title: move-parse-heavy-tests-to-internal-e2etest
description:
Move heavy tests from internal/parse/ to internal/e2etest/ now that e2etest is under internal/.

## What to do

1. For any unexported APIs used by the tests, export them in internal/parse/:
   - newTree → NewTree (used by benchmark_test.go BenchmarkParsePoolEffectiveness)
   - Any others found during the move
2. Move internal/parse/helpers_test.go to internal/e2etest/parse_helpers.go
   (export the generators: GenerateRandomCommand, GenerateCommandFromRand, etc.)
   These helpers only use exported parse APIs so they move cleanly.
3. Move these test files to internal/e2etest/ (change package, update imports):
   - internal/parse/property_test.go
   - internal/parse/property_pending_test.go
   - internal/parse/oracle_test.go
   - internal/parse/fault_injection_test.go
   - internal/parse/security_test.go
   - internal/parse/soak_test.go
   - internal/parse/concurrency_test.go
   - internal/parse/golden_test.go (update testdata path to use FindModuleRoot)
   - internal/parse/benchmark_test.go
   - internal/parse/fuzz_test.go
4. Update Makefile if parse benchmarks need a new target
5. Run tests to verify

## Keep in internal/parse/ (lightweight unit tests)
- bash_test.go, extract_test.go, dataflow_test.go, normalize_test.go,
  inline_test.go, grammars_test.go, debug_test.go, example_*_test.go

## Depends on
dcg-n0e.1 (relocate e2etest to internal/e2etest) must be done first.
